The ergonomically shaped ERGOBABY Omni Deluxe Mesh seat supports healthy hip, spine and pelvic development and ensures a natural M-shaped leg position. Comfort for the wearer is ensured by a padded lumbar support with vents and the possibility of adjusting the lumbar belt from 45.4 to 145 cm. The weight of the carrier is 900 g.
